site.title: The Groove Kit — Music Education & Practice Platform
site.description: Interactive music education platform for drummers and musicians. Beat sequencer, metronome, MIDI library, chord progressions, jazz standards, and live practice sessions.
site.author: Nathaniel School of Music

/.title: The Groove Kit — Explore Loops & Grooves
/.description: Discover drum loops, backing tracks, and play-along content organized by genre, feel, and time signature.

/sequencer.title: Rhythm Circles — Beat Sequencer | The Groove Kit
/sequencer.description: Create beats with the circular pizza sequencer. 4 drum kits, any time signature, swing control, and MIDI export.

/metronome.title: Pro Metronome | The Groove Kit
/metronome.description: Professional metronome with accent patterns, subdivisions, polyrhythm mode, tempo ramp, and rhythm trainer.

/midi.title: MIDI Library | The Groove Kit
/midi.description: Upload, visualize, and play MIDI files. Piano roll editor, track mixer, and loop surgery tools.

/chords.title: Chord Lab — Progressions | The Groove Kit
/chords.description: Browse and play chord progressions. ii-V-I, blues, rhythm changes, and more with key transposition.

/standards.title: The Real Book — Jazz Standards | The Groove Kit
/standards.description: 99 jazz standards with chord charts, backing tracks, and key transposition for practice.

/live.title: Live Sessions | The Groove Kit
/live.description: Host synchronized practice sessions for your classroom. Share room codes and control playback in real-time.

/explore.title: Explore Loops | The Groove Kit
/explore.description: Search and filter drum loops by BPM, time signature, feel, and genre. Interactive genre map visualization.
